proposed_relations.description: Both refer to the M15 Select Bus Service corridor on First and Second Avenues in Manhattan from South Ferry/125th Street; records represent the same project from different source snapshots (2009 CAC1 vs. aggregated 2009-2010 sources).

Both refer to the M15 Select Bus Service corridor on First and Second Avenues in Manhattan from South Ferry to 125th Street; project_first-second-ave-sbs-cac3 captures Phase 1 design status from January 2010 CAC3 meeting, while the base record aggregates multiple presentations.

Both describe the M15 Select Bus Service on First and Second Avenues, 8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125th Street, with bus lanes, off-board fare collection, and TSP. The cb8-2010 record captures the February 2010 CB8 presentation.

Both describe the M15 Select Bus Service on First and Second Avenues. The 2010 record captures the Phase I launch stage (October 10, 2010) and includes later 2010 source presentations; the base record captures earlier planning phase.
